name: io.github.livetennisapi/livetennisapi-mcp
description: Real-time tennis data for LLM agents: live scores, players, rankings, match-winner odds and model win-probability for ATP, WTA, Challenger and ITF.

environmentVariables.name: LIVETENNISAPI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Live Tennis API key (twjp_...). Get one at https://livetennisapi.com/#pricing — the server runs without it but only the status check will work.
